description.value: When the creature and at least five others of its kind charge together, they form a Stampede. All creatures in the Stampede's path must make a Challenging (+0) Agility test or be knocked Prone and suffer 2d10+SB Impact damage. The Stampede moves at the charging speed of the slowest creature involved.

system.benefit: When charging with at least five of its kind, creatures in the path must pass a Challenging (+0) Agility test or be knocked Prone and suffer 2d10+SB Impact damage.
